nasb.text: therefore, thus says the Lord God, ‘Behold, I, even I, am against you, and I will execute judgments among you in the sight of the nations.

esv.text: therefore thus says the Lord God: Behold, I, even I, am against you. And I will execute judgments in your midst in the sight of the nations.

cnv.text: 所以，主耶和華這樣說：“看哪！我要敵對你。我要在你中間，在列國的眼前，施行審判。

ccb.text: 因此主耶和华这样说：“看啊，我要对付你们，我必在列国面前审判你们。
